item.title: Recreating Nora’s Snake Necklace and Makeup

item.title: How to Create a Sharp Wing in One Stroke
item.description: Learn a simple eyeliner trick for a sharp wing. Move slightly down from the tip to join the lash line for extra precision.

media:content.media:description: Learn a simple eyeliner trick for a sharp wing. Move slightly down from the tip to join the lash line for extra precision.
